title: Forgotten Ruins
description: Explore mysterious ruins hidden in jungles, swamps, and mangroves. Face ancient golems, loot cursed relics, and uncover the forgotten legacy of a lost civilization
body:
# 🗿 Forgotten Ruins **Forgotten Ruins** is a Minecraft mod that brings mysterious temples and lost relics into the heart of the jungle, swamps, and mangrove biomes. Inspired by the **dark fantasy atmosphere of Shadow of the Colossus**, this mod invites players to explore long-forgotten sanctuaries, remnants of an ancient civilization protected by silent golems now reactivated by your presence. The mod REQUIRE Dawn of Time & Armor of the Ages (+the dependencies)
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## 🔍 What to expect * **Handcrafted ruins** with secrets, parkour, traps, and thematic loot * **Dark, decayed architecture** that blends naturally into the jungle, swamp, or mangrove * **Custom loot tables**: damaged relics, cursed treasures, forgotten weapons and potions * **Guardian golems**: silent sentinels, some still watchful… others unstable * A mix of **exploration, tension, and high rewards** for those who reach the heart of the ruins * No two ruins are identical—**each has its own layout, lore, and dangers** ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Gameplay design Forgotten Ruins is not just decorative. Each structure is built like a **mini dungeon**: you’ll have to **explore**, **climb**, **avoid traps**, and face **ancient defense systems**. It rewards players who take the risk—loot is rare, powerful, and often tied to the **Armor of the Ages** mod (with worn-out legendary armor, gold, potions, and enchanted relics). ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Mod ecosystem Forgotten Ruins is part of the **Dawn of Time** mod family. It uses building blocks, mobs, and loot assets from the following : * [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) – core assets & historical blocks * [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) – animated armor models & gear * [Ancient Structures](https://modrinth.com/mod/ancient-structure) – cultural overworld generation These mods work independently but complement each other to create a rich worldbuilding and exploration experience. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Feedback & Support We'd love to hear your thoughts, suggestions, or bug reports ! Feel free to join our community or support the project here: [Join our Discord](https://discord.gg/dawnoftime) [Support us on Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/dawnoftime) 🧡 Every message, idea, or share helps us keep building the Dawn of Time universe! ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * **TheGoldenWorld** – creator of the original datapack and all core structures * [Superchache39](https://www.youtube.com/@superchache39) - I learned with his videos to make datapacks * [ChatGPT](https://openai.com/) has been used to wrap up this page in markdown & it helped me to create features in the mod * [Retro Diffusion](https://www.retrodiffusion.ai/) has been used to generate the logo and the banner of this page * [Minecraft Title Generator](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/) from Ewan Howell has been used for the banner. [Support](https://ko-fi.com/ewanhowell) this guy, he is a goddamn hero
